title: RPC frontend (#1406) doesn't compile on macOS
body:
Just pulled 5c58816 and it's not building. I'm assuming this is macOS specific.

```
[ 13%] Building frontends/rpc/rpc_frontend.o
frontends/rpc/rpc_frontend.cc:520:81: error: use of undeclared identifier 'environ'
                        if (posix_spawnp(&pid, argv[0], file_actions_p, /*attrp=*/NULL, argv.data(), environ) != 0) {
                                                                                                     ^
1 error generated.
make: *** [frontends/rpc/rpc_frontend.o] Error 1
```
code_blocks:
[ 13%] Building frontends/rpc/rpc_frontend.o
frontends/rpc/rpc_frontend.cc:520:81: error: use of undeclared identifier 'environ'
                        if (posix_spawnp(&pid, argv[0], file_actions_p, /*attrp=*/NULL, argv.data(), environ) != 0) {
                                                                                                     ^
1 error generated.
make: *** [frontends/rpc/rpc_frontend.o] Error 1
